title: Landing Page Banner
prompt: Surface Landing (/) objective: Commercial first impression and conversion confidence.. Create cinematic horror-luxe page banner art with layered atmosphere and typography-safe focal zone. Style principles: cinematic contrast with restrained saturation; editorial typography hierarchy; texture-first backgrounds instead of flat fills; socially playable collaboration cues; high readability under low-light mood.
negativePrompt: No logos, no unreadable text overlays, no cartoon style, no low-resolution blur, no gore excess, no meme aesthetics.
